name: Professor Pritam Singh
title: Emeritus Professor of Economics
bio: Professor Pritam Singh is a distinguished scholar in economics and development studies with a focus on federalism, nationalism, human rights, and governance. He earned his doctorate at the University of Oxford and has held affiliations including Visiting Scholar at Wolfson College, Oxford, and Research Associate at the Department of International Development, Oxford. His research examines the intersection of economics, political structures, minority rights, and governance, particularly in India and Punjab, with implications for international human rights debates.
